subscription.title: My Plan
subscription.description: Manage your subscription and review your current usage

grandfathered.title: Temporary Legacy Plan
grandfathered.description: As an existing user, you have unlimited access temporarily. This legacy plan will eventually be replaced by a standard plan. We will notify you in advance about any changes.

q1.question: What happens if I reach my monthly limit?
q1.answer: If you reach your monthly limit, you won't be able to use that feature until your cycle renews. You can upgrade to Plus to get unlimited access.

q2.question: When does my monthly limit renew?
q2.answer: Your limit renews automatically every month on your billing cycle start date.

q3.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
q3.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You will maintain access to premium features until the end of your current billing period.

pricing.comingSoonDesc: Payment functionality will be available soon. Stay tuned!

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for getting started with the basics

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: For teachers who need more power

welcome.title: Welcome to ProfeVision!
welcome.description: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. You can upgrade at any time.
welcome.upgradeAnytime: You can upgrade to Plus at any time from your profile
welcome.successDesc: Your account has been set up successfully.

reached.title: Limit Reached
reached.description: You have reached the monthly limit of {feature} available in your current plan.

daysUntilReset.tomorrow: Your limit will reset in 1 day
daysUntilReset.multiple: Your limit will reset in {days} days

reached.waitOrUpgrade: You can wait until your limit resets, or upgrade to a higher plan to get more monthly {feature}.
